creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm working on this port. At the moment it does not work because some of the dependencies[1] do not support FreeBSD. I've contacted those upstream developers. Hopefully, we'll be able to enjoy our cat with wings soon. ;)

I keep the WIP port on GitHub.[2]

[1]: https://github.com/soc/directories-rs/issues/25
[2]: https://github.com/0mp/freebsd-ports/tree/bat/textproc/bat
